mapper.select: SELECT * FROM query_log WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND generated_sql IS NOT NULL AND execution_success = TRUE ORDER BY score DESC, rating DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM query_log WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND execution_success = true AND intent_sql IS NOT NULL ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalQueries, SUM(CASE WHEN execution_success = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successQueries, SUM(CASE WHEN execution_success = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failedQueries, SUM(CASE WHEN is_from_template = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as templateUsageCount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_from_template = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as llmGenerationCount, AVG(execution_time) as averageExecutionTime, AVG(rating) as averageRating, SUM(CASE WHEN is_labeled = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as labeledCount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_labeled = FALSE OR is_labeled IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unlabeledCount FROM query_log
